title: [River Rapids]
description: Turbulence heaves the water into a nightmarish beast, smashing against the rough rock walls, before rolling over itself in a roaring fury.  It is extremely difficult to maintain balance and equilibrium in the maelstrom, and the strong current threatens to suck you away to a watery demise.  The only refuge lies on the floor of the ravine, either to the the north side or the south side of the river.

wayto.16726: ;e if resolve = Spell[9704] and resolve.known? and resolve.affordable? and not resolve.active?; resolve.cast; end; move 'swim north side'; waitrt?
wayto.16730: ;e if resolve = Spell[9704] and resolve.known? and resolve.affordable? and not resolve.active?; resolve.cast; end; move 'swim south side'; waitrt?
